hero.headline: Charleston's *Reliable* HVAC Repair & Installation Specialists
hero.subheadline: Emergency service, expert technicians, and honest pricing for all your heating and cooling needs in the Lowcountry.

services_section.label: OUR SERVICES
services_section.heading: Complete HVAC Solutions
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to new installations, we handle all your heating and cooling needs

services.title: AC Repair & Service
services.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of air conditioning units. We service all major brands and handle everything from refrigerant leaks to compressor replacements.

services.title: Heating System Repair
services.description: Expert repair of furnaces, heat pumps, and boilers. Quick response times to keep your family warm during Charleston's cooler months.

services.title: HVAC Installation
services.description: Professional installation of new heating and cooling systems. We help you choose the right equipment for your home's size and budget.

services.title: Duct Cleaning & Repair
services.description: Improve your indoor air quality with professional duct cleaning and repair services. Reduce allergens and increase system efficiency.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance
services.description: Regular tune-ups to prevent breakdowns and extend equipment life. Seasonal maintenance plans available to keep your system running smoothly.

about.heading: Serving Charleston with Honest HVAC Service
about.body: Gocojohe HVAC Solutions has been keeping Charleston families comfortable for over a decade. Our certified technicians provide reliable repairs, quality installations, and honest advice. We understand the unique climate challenges of the Lowcountry and deliver solutions that last.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: My AC went out on a 95-degree day and they had someone here within 2 hours. Fixed the issue with the capacitor quickly and didn't try to oversell me on anything else. Very honest pricing.

reviews.name: Mike T.
reviews.text: Installed a new heat pump system last month. The crew was professional, cleaned up everything, and explained how to maintain it properly. System is running great so far.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Called them for a heating issue in February. Technician diagnosed a faulty thermostat and had it replaced same day. Fair price and excellent service.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREAS
service_areas.heading: Proudly Serving the Charleston Area
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable HVAC service throughout the Lowcountry

cta.heading: Need HVAC Service Today?
cta.body: Don't wait for your heating or cooling problem to get worse. Our certified technicians are ready to help with fast, honest service.
